economic_notes: Band has two government business enterprises: Bridge River Development Corporation (100% owned) and Bridge River Management LP (99.99% owned), both accounted for under modified equity method. Economic dependence on Indigenous Services Canada noted.
notes: Auditor firm name not clearly identified - address shows Nanaimo BC office but firm name not stated on report header. Two GBEs (Bridge River Development Corp and Bridge River Management LP) excluded from consolidation and accounted for under modified equity method. BRDC carries a deficit of $535,521 and BRMLP carries a deficit of $158,634. Large increase in tangible capital assets ($4.16M in purchases) driving significant investing outflows. CMHC revenue dropped substantially from $1,727,072 in 2022 to $344,532 in 2023. ISC funding increased significantly from $3,353,091 to $5,314,133. No schedule of remuneration for chief, council or staff included in the financial statements. Honoraria of $102,954 paid across segments. Resources segment includes $758,346 from BC Hydro suggesting significant resource revenue agreement.
